semantic_sweep.review_note: Reviewed the complete chapter, all eight assigned source notes and source-setting limits, the seven-record admission fixture, both stopped update campaigns, the seven-stage campaign-to-governor/readmission lifecycle, all 81 independently encoded routes, all 91 rejecting mutations, the seven retained legacy theorem declarations, the combined lifecycle theorem, every manifest atom, all current prose candidates, the lifecycle diagram, worked trace, strongest objections, test plan, source crosswalk, summary, and handoff. The sweep keeps bounded adaptive search without admission authority as the distinct owner; establishes finite authored custody, reachability, one governor-only handoff, and one version-2 readmission; preserves the 0/9 threshold result and four no-change dispositions; and explicitly excludes adaptive-search quality, semantic novelty, useful improvement, objective legitimacy, evaluator independence, safety, deployment, transfer, SOTA, AGI, ASI, and chapter-core support.

scope.population: Bounded adaptive campaigns that generate or select tasks, environments, curricula, programs, tools, procedures, agent architectures, evaluators, model or policy candidates, scientific hypotheses, archives, descendants, and follow-on campaigns for a declared consumer and purpose.
scope.environment: Eight reviewed assigned source notes; seven synthetic Boolean campaign records and ten rejecting controls; two fixed stopped local update campaigns; a seven-stage, 81-route lifecycle with 91 rejecting mutations; and a future preregistered public-safe natural adaptive search campaign. No deployed or genuinely open-ended campaign environment is represented.
scope.model: A prospectively bounded campaign contract over exact scope, objective and representation identity, controller and policies, generator and selection denominators, append-only archive and hazard custody, cumulative resources, stop observations and effect receipts, independent qualification, governor-only handoff, descendant invalidation, and successor-version readmission. The implementation is a finite authored state machine over trusted records; it is not an adaptive search engine.
scope.authority: Human or institutional governance freezes consumer/purpose, objective, representation, controller, generator/evaluator/archive/hazard policies, budgets, stop authority, horizon, support ceiling, disclosure, and publication; distinct objective author, task generator, candidate generator, evaluator, selector, archive custodian, qualifier, resource observer, stop owner, hazard owner, residual owner, admission governor, Evidence State owner, and release owner govern their exact surfaces.
scope.time: Semantic review current through 2026-07-16; campaign version, model, generator, evaluator, representation, task/data distribution, environment, dependencies, objective, controller, budgets, horizon, threat, lifecycle, and reuse permissions are frozen prospectively and expire after material change.
scope.artifact: Chapter and manifest contract; eight reviewed source mappings; legacy fixture/result schemas; seven campaign records and ten controls; two fixed stopped update results; seven retained legacy route theorems; the seven-stage combined lifecycle theorem; independent 81-route/91-mutation consumer, schema, result, receipt, and adequacy dossier; future natural task, candidate, evaluator, archive, resource, stop, hazard, ablation, replication, recursive-depth, and transfer bundles.

assumptions: A legitimate and operationally meaningful campaign purpose, representation, task/candidate space, consumer, and useful-novelty criterion can be frozen prospectively without claiming objective completeness.
Natural public-safe adaptive-search tasks can expose useful novelty, evaluator gaming, archive bias, hazard, stop behavior, transfer, and total cost under matched budgets.
Separately implemented qualification and outcome evaluators can be built and their shared model, code, data, infrastructure, organizational, incentive, funding, and reporting dependencies measured.
Strong no-search, fixed-task, conventional-search, human-authored, and source-system comparators can be matched on tasks, models, tools, data, compute, latency, feedback, and human labor.
Generated tasks, candidates, attempts, payloads, reuse relations, descendants, and campaign forks can be inventoried well enough to measure selection denominators while exposing unknown closure.
Normative choices about objective legitimacy, dual use, privacy, dangerous payload custody, stop authority, acceptable residuals, and publication remain explicit premises.
chapter_defaults.strongest_counterclaim: POET, FunSearch, Voyager, ADAS, Darwin Godel Machine, evolutionary and Bayesian optimization, automated program synthesis, ordinary experiment tracking, artifact registries, budget schedulers, sandboxing, and CI/CD already provide the useful search and archive mechanisms; adding a governance campaign layer cannot make an evaluator valid or an objective legitimate and may reduce discovery, diversity, reproducibility, and throughput through bureaucracy, false quarantine, and duplicated review.
chapter_defaults.falsifier: A reachable ordinary or adversarial trace violates any frozen purpose, objective, representation, generator, candidate, evaluator/exposure, denominator, archive, hazard, resource, stop, qualification, authority, expiry, reuse, or terminal-outcome rule; a required field has no exercised producer, consumer, owner, or consequence; or a strong simpler search/control baseline dominates the preregistered joint frontier.

required_lanes.necessity: Freeze current open-ended environment generation, program search, embodied skill libraries, agent-design search, self-modifying archives, optimization, experiment tracking, hazard custody, and stop-control comparators without importing source-reported gains or novelty.
Justify campaign purpose, objective legitimacy, task and hazard boundaries, dual-use/privacy custody, stop authority, acceptable residuals, reuse, disclosure, and publication.

Specify adaptive campaign, archive, exposure, resource, stop, handoff, controller-change, and portfolio state machines with temporal and trace semantics, countermodels, and explicit open-world limits.

Run a multi-round task/candidate generator, separate evaluator and qualifier, append-only archive, payload tiers, observed budget meter, effect-tested stop, hazard quarantine, typed reuse, and governor-only handoff.

Measure semantic novelty, diversity, useful task success, transfer, regression, false qualification, hazard, authority demand, coverage, latency, compute, calls, storage, human/evaluator labor, opportunity, recovery, and governance cost jointly.

Ablate task generator, candidate generator, evaluator exposure, separate qualification, archive retention, denominator accounting, controller, resource meter, stop effect, hazard custody, and handoff under matched adaptive histories.

Repeat across task and candidate classes, models, generators, evaluators, representations, search algorithms, organizations, environments, threat models, portfolio compositions, recursive depths, horizons, and time with independent implementations.

contrary_evidence: POET, FunSearch, Voyager, ADAS, and Darwin Godel Machine report scoped environment, program, skill, architecture, or coding-agent improvements without this complete governance contract.

Evolutionary optimization, program synthesis, experiment tracking, artifact stores, sandboxing, budget schedulers, and CI/CD already provide substantial search, archive, resource, and promotion separation.
No finite representation, objective, task generator, archive, or novelty metric can establish socially complete or open-world useful discovery.
Adaptive search eventually leaks information from repeated evaluators and may overfit any practical qualification lifecycle.
Retaining all candidates increases attack surface, privacy exposure, storage, review load, and descendant invalidation cost; deleting them reduces reproducibility and negative knowledge.
Separate evaluators may share models, data, infrastructure, organizations, incentives, or blind spots with generators and selectors.
Governance overhead and false quarantine can suppress useful novelty, diversity, availability, contestability, and correction.
The local evidence contains no generated task, candidate, evolving archive, measured evaluator behavior, stop effect, hazard artifact, useful discovery, or transfer.
known_confounds: Purpose, representation, task space, novelty, utility, hazard, budget, stop, transfer, and archive denominators can be narrowed after results are observed.
Apparent mechanism benefit may come from more model calls, compute, latency, tools, data, evaluator feedback, human hints, or repair opportunities.
No-search and fixed-task baselines can be made artificially weak, while source-system baselines may be impossible to match exactly.
Generator and evaluator can share training data, model families, prompts, tools, infrastructure, or sampled tasks despite distinct identities.
Best-only reporting, discarded-child rules, timeouts, malformed outputs, and payload deletion can change the selection denominator.
Fail-closed controls can look safe by avoiding hard tasks, releasing nothing, or ending exposure before delayed failures.
Search-family allocation and shared evaluator capacity can make portfolio coverage or independence appear broader than it is.
Human labor, opportunity cost, archive maintenance, hazard review, privacy, recovery, and governance delay can be omitted or shifted outside the measured campaign.
acceptance_criteria: Every frozen purpose, objective, representation, controller, generator, task, candidate, evaluator, exposure, denominator, archive, payload, resource, stop, hazard, qualification, handoff, reuse, expiry, and outcome field has an exact producer, consumer, owner, valid case, rejecting mutation, and observed consequence.

A preregistered natural multi-round campaign meets every joint novelty, usefulness, transfer, regression, false-qualification, hazard, authority, stop, denominator, cost, causal-ablation, independent-replication, recursive-depth, and transfer gate against all strong matched comparators.

The adaptive campaign mechanisms have predicted causal signatures that disappear under matched ablations and cannot be explained by extra resources, evaluator leakage, hidden human help, weak baselines, selection-denominator changes, or non-release.
narrowing_criteria: Narrow every result to exact consumer/purpose, legitimate objective, representation, task/candidate space, generator, evaluator/exposure, archive policy, search algorithm, model, environment, budget, stop, hazard, recursive depth, horizon, observed effects, costs, and residuals.

Separate source-reported gain, generated artifact, evaluator validity, qualification, novelty, diversity, semantic usefulness, transfer, stopped search, procedural value, admission eligibility, support movement, and live authority.

Unknown objective legitimacy, selection denominator, evaluator dependency, hazard, owner capacity, external effect, delayed failure, replication, recursive composition, or transfer remains residual, blocked, narrowed, or refuted.
refutation_criteria: Refute an invariant when a reachable ordinary or adversarial trace violates it or a required field lacks an exercised producer, consumer, owner, or consequence.

Refute a mechanism benefit when its matched ablation preserves every joint outcome, the mechanism worsens the frontier, or its effect is explained by extra search, feedback, compute, human labor, denominator change, or non-release.

Refute useful, open-ended, independent, safe, general, superior, reproducible, or transferable improvement language when a simpler baseline dominates, evaluator leakage or hazard escapes, stopping fails, selection history is incomplete, or independent replication/transfer fails.
deprecation_criteria: Deprecate only when a more precise data, benchmark, procedural-memory, policy-update, self-improvement, field, readiness, security, artifact, resource, evidence, or release owner supersedes the atom and all campaign consumers migrate with lineage.

reproduction.environment_lock: lean/lean-toolchain and lean/lake-manifest.json plus the repository Python environment
reproduction.evaluator_identity: independently encoded Python consumer plus Lean kernel

residual.next_unblocking_condition: Freeze and run the public-safe multi-round adaptive campaign with no-search, fixed-task, conventional-search, human-authored, and strongest source-system baselines; separate evaluators; complete denominators; observed resource and stop effects; hazard custody; typed reuse; governor-only handoff; causal ablations; independent replication; recursive-depth stress; and transfer.

non_claims: Semantic review, source-reported novelty, a generated task or artifact, evaluator score, self-verification, archive frontier, sandbox, complete record, finite theorem, stopped search, or zero release does not establish useful, safe, independent, open-ended, general, or authorized improvement.
The current seven records, ten mutations, seven theorems, and fixed stopped update campaigns establish only their exact Boolean routes, digests, local updates, and no-promotion boundaries.
No campaign, support state, procedure, model update, field authority, deployment, publication, AGI, or ASI claim changes without its separate owner and accepted transition.

open-ended-improvement-engines.core.strongest_counterclaim: Existing search, experiment-tracking, archive, sandbox, budget, and release systems provide the useful boundary; this contract adds costly governance without making objectives legitimate, evaluators valid, or adaptive search safe.
open-ended-improvement-engines.core.falsifier: Any frozen campaign, denominator, hazard, resource, stop, authority, or terminal rule is violated, a candidate gains de facto admission authority, or a strong simpler baseline dominates the joint frontier.
acceptance_criteria: Meet every frozen natural adaptive-search novelty, usefulness, transfer, regression, qualification, hazard, stop, cost, causal, replication, recursive-depth, and transfer gate against strong comparators.

open-ended-improvement-engines.problem.0.strongest_counterclaim: Representative adaptive-search systems remain operator-bounded tools whose objectives, evaluators, budgets, archives, and releases are already controlled well enough for their actual scope.
open-ended-improvement-engines.problem.0.falsifier: A dated representative audit finds no material denominator, evaluator, archive, resource, hazard, stop, controller, authority, or reporting gap.
acceptance_criteria: Complete a dated audit of strong current source systems and conventional search controls and retain only exact unresolved boundaries.

open-ended-improvement-engines.insuffici.strongest_counterclaim: A proper composition of experiment tracking, artifact storage, evaluator versioning, sandboxing, quotas, CI/CD, and code review supplies every named property at lower cost.
open-ended-improvement-engines.insuffici.falsifier: A frozen conventional composition exercises all named properties and joint outcomes without the distinct campaign contract.
acceptance_criteria: Reproduce or audit strong conventional and source-system baselines before claiming a distinct gap or advantage.

open-ended-improvement-engines.minimum.0.strongest_counterclaim: The proposed minimum remains campaign theater unless adaptive task/candidate generation, fresh qualification, complete attempts, observed resources, stop effects, hazard custody, and matched baselines run end to end.
open-ended-improvement-engines.minimum.0.falsifier: Any named minimum component lacks a producer, consumer, observed consequence, clean rerun, or exact no-authority boundary.
acceptance_criteria: Execute the exact public-safe multi-round campaign with all matched baselines, complete dispositions, fresh qualification, observed costs, effect-tested stops, quarantined hazard, and governor-only handoff.

open-ended-improvement-engines.beyond_so.strongest_counterclaim: A governed campaign portfolio is dominated by simpler search systems and compounds evaluator leakage, correlated errors, hazardous retention, resource contention, bureaucracy, and false quarantine without producing more useful novelty.
open-ended-improvement-engines.beyond_so.falsifier: Any joint gate fails, a mechanism lacks its causal signature, a simpler baseline dominates, stopping or hazard custody fails, or replication, recursive-depth robustness, or transfer fails.
acceptance_criteria: Complete the preregistered multi-comparator causal, independently replicated, recursive-depth and transfer program and meet every joint gate.

open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.strongest_counterclaim: For low-risk search, the evaluator score and archive frontier can safely trigger automatic reuse.
open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.falsifier: Any campaign output changes live authority or is narrated as useful improvement without the separate evidence and authority path.
acceptance_criteria: Inject high-scoring unsafe, useless, over-budget, and authority-seeking candidates and observe non-admission without relying on non-release alone.

open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.strongest_counterclaim: Retaining only eligible or informative candidates is sufficient because malformed and failed attempts add no decision value.
open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.falsifier: Any generated attempt disappears from the denominator or lacks a durable disposition/deletion receipt while campaign claims remain unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Reconcile generator emissions, attempts, evaluator calls, archive objects, payload custody, dispositions, and reported denominators exactly.

open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.strongest_counterclaim: A held-out label remains adequate when candidates receive repeated aggregate feedback but not raw cases.
open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.falsifier: Adaptive feedback changes effective exposure or correlated error without changing candidate/evidence scope.
acceptance_criteria: Measure leakage and generalization as feedback content and exposure rounds vary, then expire or narrow claims when fresh qualification is unavailable.

open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.strongest_counterclaim: Full executable retention is required for scientific reproducibility and can be made safe with ordinary access control.
open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.falsifier: A dangerous or private payload escapes, or destruction erases the durable failure and replay-loss record.
acceptance_criteria: Exercise public, restricted, encrypted, quarantined, destroyed, and deleted-with-receipt payload tiers with observed access and replay consequences.

open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.strongest_counterclaim: Per-run quotas are enough because retries and descendants are separately attributable experiments.
open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.falsifier: A retry, child, fork, or successor resets material consumption or opportunity cost while the portfolio remains within budget on paper.
acceptance_criteria: Observe and reconcile cumulative compute, calls, time, storage, evaluator, human, hazard, and opportunity budgets across the complete lineage.

open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.strongest_counterclaim: A recorded stop owner plus infrastructure quota is sufficient without campaign-specific effect testing.
open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.falsifier: The owner cannot observe, decide, act, or produce a verified stop effect within the frozen window.
acceptance_criteria: Inject every stop trigger and measure observation, decision, action latency, effect, residual work, descendants, and recovery.

open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.strongest_counterclaim: Adaptive controller and evaluator changes are ordinary campaign optimization and need not leave the campaign identity.
open-ended-improvement-engines.invariant.falsifier: Any objective, controller, evaluator authority, bound, depth, or admission change occurs without separate identity, baseline, authority, and evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Exercise proposed controller changes and show the campaign pauses while a separate RSI admission path decides them.

open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.strongest_counterclaim: Frozen human objectives and task-specific evaluators keep drift below material levels in bounded campaigns.
open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.falsifier: Across calibrated adaptive histories, drift remains below the frozen materiality threshold and does not alter usefulness or hazard conclusions.
acceptance_criteria: Mutate objective proxies, representations, task generators, difficulty, and novelty rules while independently measuring semantic consumer value.

open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.strongest_counterclaim: Fresh held-out tests and different evaluator prompts adequately prevent adaptive evaluator gaming.
open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.falsifier: Calibrated exposure, contamination, dependency, and self-verification attacks remain below the frozen false-qualification threshold.
acceptance_criteria: Run adaptive exposure, data contamination, proxy, same-family, candidate-selected-evidence, and correlated-blind-spot controls.

open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.strongest_counterclaim: Eligibility filters and best-first archives are documented well enough that discarded attempts do not bias claims.
open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.falsifier: A clean full-emission replay finds no material difference between complete and retained denominators.
acceptance_criteria: Recompute every claim from complete emissions, repairs, failures, timeouts, discards, payload deletions, and transfer failures.

open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.strongest_counterclaim: Standard schedulers, quotas, and operator kill switches make stop records operationally reliable.
open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.falsifier: Every frozen stop trigger produces timely independently observed termination with bounded residual effects under load and owner unavailability.
acceptance_criteria: Inject triggers, latency, overload, owner absence, controller resistance, descendants, and recovery conditions.

open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.strongest_counterclaim: Public-safe workloads and ordinary sandbox/access controls make dangerous artifact escape immaterial.
open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.falsifier: Calibrated dual-use, privacy, vulnerability, proprietary, and payload-access probes stay below the frozen materiality threshold with no hidden distribution.
acceptance_criteria: Exercise generation, storage, retrieval, review, redaction, encryption, destruction, publication, and descendant reuse across hazard classes.

open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.strongest_counterclaim: The chapter already labels stopped search and negative knowledge separately, so capability-gain laundering is not a material risk.
open-ended-improvement-engines.failure_m.falsifier: A dated audit finds no claim or decision surface that equates non-release, archive growth, procedural learning, or avoided harm with candidate capability gain.
acceptance_criteria: Audit all campaign and reader surfaces and inject zero-release, no-gain, archive-only, and procedural-value cases that must remain separately typed.

open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.strongest_counterclaim: The lifecycle and consumer establish one authored governor-review handoff but trust every scope, legitimacy, denominator, evaluation, stop-effect, residual, and invalidation record; they do not establish campaign quality or live governor behavior.
open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.falsifier: Any incomplete authored trace reaches governor review, any handoff grants support or authority, any registered mutation survives, or prose broadens the result beyond finite record custody.
acceptance_criteria: Preserve all 81 routes and 91 mutations, then run the frozen natural adaptive campaign and an independently implemented transfer consumer.

open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.strongest_counterclaim: The lifecycle binds evaluator and qualifier identity and blocks the missing-record route, but the identities, dependency disclosures, calibration, exposures, observations, and qualification result remain trusted inputs.
open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.falsifier: Missing or mismatched qualification reaches evaluation or handoff, a registered evaluator mutation survives, or the finite gate is described as evaluator independence.
acceptance_criteria: Run adaptive exposure and correlated-evaluator attacks with independently generated qualification evidence and measured error.

open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.strongest_counterclaim: The lifecycle rejects budget reset and requires carryover into version 2, but the usage, cost, opportunity, and enforcement receipts are authored rather than independently observed.
open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.falsifier: A descendant or successor resets custody, an unbound budget reaches archive progression, or any budget mutation survives.
acceptance_criteria: Bind the lifecycle to observed compute, calls, latency, storage, evaluator, human, hazard, and opportunity ledgers in a natural campaign.

open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.strongest_counterclaim: The lifecycle requires bound owner, observation, action, effect, timeliness, residual, and descendant records, but all are trusted authored facts and no stop or quarantine executes.
open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.falsifier: A missing, late, ceremonial, mismatched, or effectless stop reaches adjudication or any stop mutation survives.
acceptance_criteria: Inject live triggers, owner unavailability, controller resistance, descendants, latency, quarantine, and recovery while independently observing effects.

open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.strongest_counterclaim: The lifecycle binds generator, denominator, archive, complete dispositions, payload custody, and replay fields, but it does not generate or inspect emissions and trusts archive completeness.
open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.falsifier: Incomplete attempt, failure, null, unsafe, timeout, or payload custody reaches archive progression, or an archive mutation survives.
acceptance_criteria: Reconcile a real adaptive generator's emissions, filters, repairs, timeouts, discards, payload tiers, deletion receipts, and replay consequences.

open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.strongest_counterclaim: The lifecycle requires exact residual and owner custody before handoff, but it trusts owner identity, capacity, acknowledgement, duty, deadline, and closure evidence.
open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.falsifier: Missing or mismatched residual custody reaches adjudication, an unowned residual reaches review, or a registered ownership mutation survives.
acceptance_criteria: Exercise owner overload, absence, transfer, acknowledgement, deadlines, closure evidence, and unresolved terminal routing in the natural campaign.

open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.strongest_counterclaim: The lifecycle rejects score, candidate, release, support, and self-ratified controller authority and records zero support/effects, but real permissions, indirect reuse, descendants, publication, and side effects are not observed.
open-ended-improvement-engines.formal.op.falsifier: Any authored route grants live authority or support, any authority mutation survives, or a candidate bypasses governor review in the future executable campaign.
acceptance_criteria: Bind the model to real permission and effect ledgers, indirect reuse, descendants, publication, revocation, and bypass attacks under an external observer.

open-ended-improvement-engines.prose.81d.rationale: Line-wrapped evaluator availability and residual boundary.

open-ended-improvement-engines.prose.f0f.rationale: Line-wrapped list of insufficient evidence artifacts.

open-ended-improvement-engines.prose.fb6.rationale: Restates descendant authority not inherited through reuse.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: They do not prove campaign quality,

preserved_disposition.rationale: Exact limit on what the seven Lean theorems prove.

prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The formal-audit surface was rewritten for the reachable lifecycle; the old sentence hash is no longer current prose and the replacements preserve its bounded non-claim.

prose_review_lineage.retired_sentence: transfer, safe self-improvement, model quality, or ASI.
prose_review_lineage.retirement_reason: The formal-audit surface was rewritten for the reachable lifecycle; the old sentence hash is no longer current prose and the replacements preserve its bounded non-claim.

non_claims: This semantic sweep does not promote the chapter, establish useful novelty, evaluator independence, objective legitimacy, adaptive campaign quality, safe self-improvement, general improvement, transfer, deployment readiness, AGI, or ASI.

All source-reported results, Boolean records, finite route theorems, the combined lifecycle theorem, 81 routes, 91 mutations, and fixed stopped updates remain limited to their exact authored task, model, evaluator, archive, resource, and authority scopes.

Negative, null, duplicate, malformed, ineligible, unsafe, over-budget, timed-out, failed-transfer, evaluator-disagreement, stop-failure, hazard, privacy, rights, opportunity-cost, over-quarantine, and irreversible outcomes remain visible and cannot be relabeled as successful discovery.
